description: Mike Horton discusses Geodnet's mission to provide affordable, centimeter-accurate positioning services globally, leveraging blockchain technology and the Solana ecosystem.
topic_summary: Geodnet aims to build the largest precise positioning network for robotics, utilizing over 14,000 satellite reference stations to enhance accuracy from meter to centimeter level. The integration of blockchain ensures a decentralized and reliable network. Horton predicts a quadrillion-dollar market opportunity in decentralized precise positioning over the next decade, impacting various industries including telecommunications and energy.
